shapes.name: TextBox 7
shapes.text: This project presents an AI-based, language-agnostic automated code review and auto-fixing system that helps identify bugs, code smells, and inefficient coding practices. By combining static code analysis with AI-driven reasoning, the system provides clear explanations and suggested fixes, reducing manual review effort. The solution is deployed on a Linux-based cloud platform, improving scalability, code quality, and developer productivity.

shapes.name: TextBox 14
shapes.text: Manual code review is time-consuming, inconsistent, and heavily dependent on human expertise.

shapes.name: TextBox 15
shapes.text: Developers, especially beginners, struggle to identify syntax, logical, and coding standard issues, leading to poor code quality.

shapes.name: TextBox 16
shapes.text: Existing tools lack intelligent automation for comprehensive code review, auto-fixing, and meaningful explanations, creating a need for an AI-based solution.

shapes.name: TextBox 14
shapes.text: To automatically analyze source code and identify syntax, logical, and coding standard issues using AI techniques.

shapes.name: TextBox 15
shapes.text: To generate accurate fixes and optimized code suggestions with clear explanations for developers.

shapes.name: TextBox 16
shapes.text: To improve code quality, reduce manual review effort, and enhance developer productivity and learning.

shapes.name: Rectangle 3
shapes.text: Hybrid AI-Based Code Analysis: Combines static analysis with AI reasoning for accurate bug detection and code review.Language-Agnostic Design: Enables analysis across multiple programming languages without language-specific dependency.Explainable Auto-Fixing System: Provides human-readable explanations along with automated code fix suggestions.

shapes.name: Rectangle 3
shapes.text: Frontend:-HTML, CSS, JavaScriptReact.js (for interactive UI)Backend:-PythonFlask / DJANGO(API development)AI / Code Analysis:-Large Language Models (LLMs) for code reviewStatic Code Analysis techniquesRule-based and ML-based bug detectionDatabase:-PostgreSQL / MongoDB (store code, results, logs)Cloud DeploymentCloud Platform: AWS / Google Cloud / Microsoft AzureContainerization: DockerHosting: Cloud VM / App Engine / ECSStorage: Cloud Object StorageCI/CD (optional): GitHub Actions

shapes.name: TextBox 7
shapes.text: START → User enters message → Frontend captures input → HTTP POST request to Django → Django parses JSON → Prompt constructed for LLM → Request sent to Ollama API → Llama 3.1 model processes prompt → AI generates response → Django sends JSON response → Frontend displays output → END

shapes.name: Rectangle 11
shapes.text: The proposed Code Reviewer & Auto-Fixer system demonstrates the effectiveness of automating code review and bug-fixing processes, significantly reducing reliance on human reviewers. By leveraging AI agents, the system provides fast, consistent, and accurate feedback, which is particularly beneficial for beginners and large development teams.

shapes.name: Rectangle 12
shapes.text: 👤 User → 💻 UI → ⚙️ Django → 🧠 Sentient Engine → 🤖 Llama Model → 📤 Response

shapes.name: Rectangle 6
shapes.text: View Full Technical Documentation(Click here)(Methods • Algorithms • Architecture • References)

shapes.name: TextBox 4
shapes.text: The Code Reviewer & Auto-Fixer – Agent System successfully demonstrates how AI can enhance the software development process by automating code review and bug fixing. It provides fast, accurate, and consistent feedback, reduces dependency on human reviewers, and helps improve code quality while supporting learning for beginners. The modular agent-based design ensures scalability and maintainability, and cloud deployment allows accessibility from anywhere. Overall, the project showcases the practical application of AI in real-world coding environments, making software development more efficient, reliable, and developer-friendly.
